zh.lifeSummary: 當Alix de Rumigny於1197年出生在法國時，她的父親Nicolas de Rumigny Seigneur de Rumigny47歲，母親Mahaut Mathilde II d'Avesnes27歲。她和Anseau IV de Garlande de La Houssaye至少有4個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於1252年享年55歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alix de Rumigny于1197年出生在法国时，她的父亲Nicolas de Rumigny Seigneur de Rumigny47岁，母亲Mahaut Mathilde II d'Avesnes27岁。她和Anseau IV de Garlande de La Houssaye至少有4个儿子和2个女儿。她去世于1252年享年55岁。

nameMeanings.name: Alix
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant of   Alex  , used only as a feminine name. Its formation has probably been influenced by   Alice .

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of the various boys' names with the first syllable Ed-, especially Edward .

variants.name: Edward
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

en.lifeSummary: When Alix de Rumigny was born in 1197, in France, her father, Nicolas de Rumigny Seigneur de Rumigny, was 47 and her mother, Mahaut Mathilde II d'Avesnes, was 27. She had at least 4 sons and 2 daughters with Anseau IV de Garlande de La Houssaye. She died in 1252, at the age of 55.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alix de Rumigny est née en 1197, à France, son père, Nicolas de Rumigny Seigneur de Rumigny, avait 47 ans et sa mère, Mahaut Mathilde II d'Avesnes, avait 27 ans. Elle a eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles avec Anseau IV de Garlande de La Houssaye. Elle est décédée en 1252, à l’âge de 55 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alix de Rumigny 1197 in Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Nicolas de Rumigny Seigneur de Rumigny 47 und ihre Mutter Mahaut Mathilde II d'Avesnes 27. Sie hatte mit Anseau IV de Garlande de La Houssaye mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1252 im Alter von 55 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alix de Rumigny è nata il nel 1197 nel Francia, sua padre, Nicolas de Rumigny Seigneur de Rumigny, aveva 47 anni e sua madre, Mahaut Mathilde II d'Avesnes, aveva 27 anni. Lei avuto almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie con Anseau IV de Garlande de La Houssaye. Morì nel 1252, all'età di 55 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Alix de Rumignyが1197年にフランスで生まれた時，父Nicolas de Rumigny Seigneur de Rumignyは47歳，母Mahaut Mathilde II d'Avesnesは27歳であった。彼女はAnseau IV de Garlande de La Houssayeとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1252年に55歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alix de Rumigny(이)가 1197년 프랑스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Nicolas de Rumigny Seigneur de Rumigny(은)는 47세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mahaut Mathilde II d'Avesnes(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 Anseau IV de Garlande de La Houssaye(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1252년 55세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alix de Rumigny nasceu em 1197, em França, seu pai, Nicolas de Rumigny Seigneur de Rumigny, tinha 47 anos e sua mãe, Mahaut Mathilde II d'Avesnes, tinha 27 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas com Anseau IV de Garlande de La Houssaye. Ela faleceu em 1252, com 55 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alix de Rumigny родилась в 1197 г. в местности Франция, её отцу по имени Nicolas de Rumigny Seigneur de Rumigny было 47 лет, а матери, которую звали Mahaut Mathilde II d'Avesnes, 27. У неё было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери от Anseau IV de Garlande de La Houssaye. Она умерла в 1252 г. в возрасте 55 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alix de Rumigny nació en 1197, en Francia, su papá, Nicolas de Rumigny Seigneur de Rumigny, tenía 47 años y su mamá, Mahaut Mathilde II d'Avesnes, tenía 27 años. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas con Anseau IV de Garlande de La Houssaye. Murió en 1252, a la edad de 55 años.
